name: Editor Advanced Link
description: Add title, target etc. attributes to Text Editor's link dialog if the text format allows them.

suggests.drupal/editor_file: Allows creating links to uploaded files in the text editor easily.
suggests.drupal/linkit: Autocomplete interface for internal and external linking within WYSIWYG editors.
suggests.drupal/ckeditor_entity_link: Alternative to Linkit that provides an easy interface for internal linking within the editor.
